name: Game SpeedUp
author: Valdotorium
description:
Speed up your Subwaybuilder gameplay (and waiting-for-money experience) by pushing the game's speed to its limits.

This mod allows the game to be sped up way beyond its unmodded limits by increasing the maximum speed the game could run in "fast" and "ultrafast" modes (theoretically, if the performance allows it to).
Vanilla max speed: 8.33 game Minutes / second
SpeedUp Mod max speed: 45 game Minutes / second

The mod can be en-/disabled using a new button in the top toolbar.

Tested on an Apple M1 processor, the game's max speed with the mod enabled on a system running with 50 trains at medium demand ranged from 2 to 2.5x the vanilla max speed.

Info: Enabling / Disabling the mod automatically pauses it, you have to unpause it. This is necessary for the mod to work correctly.

_This is a BETA release. There are some known minor issues with this mod:
-If mods are reloaded with the mod enabled, the button the mod adds magically duplicates. This can be reset by restarting the game.
-The values in the dashboard need a few seconds of the mod panel being opened until they are accurate._
